# bssvd

Use data from international demographic databases to create objects that
describe regularities in demographic rates.

**bssvd** supports package
[bage](https://github.com/bayesiandemography/bage), and is not intended
to be used directly for data analysis.

## Installation

``` r

devtools::install_github("bayesiandemography/bssvd")
```

## Example

``` r

library(bssvd)
library(rsdmx)
url <- paste("https://sdmx.oecd.org/public/rest/data",
             "OECD.ELS.SAE,DSD_LFS@DF_LFS_INDIC,1.1",
             "all?dimensionAtObservation=AllDimensions",
             sep = "/")
lfp_sdmx <- rsdmx::readSDMX(url)
lfp_df <- as.data.frame(lfp_sdmx)
lfp <- data_ssvd_lfp(lfp_df)
```

# Package index

## All functions

- [`asfr_subset`](https://bayesiandemography.github.io/bssvd/reference/asfr_subset.md)
  : Human Fertility Database Data on Age-Specific Fertility Rates
- [`coef_csa()`](https://bayesiandemography.github.io/bssvd/reference/coef_csa.md)
  : Obtain Coefficients from Scaled SVD of Census School Attendance Data
- [`coef_hfd()`](https://bayesiandemography.github.io/bssvd/reference/coef_hfd.md)
  : Obtain Coefficients from Scaled SVD of HFD Data
- [`coef_himd()`](https://bayesiandemography.github.io/bssvd/reference/coef_himd.md)
  : Obtain Coefficients from Scaled SVD of HIMD Data
- [`coef_hmd()`](https://bayesiandemography.github.io/bssvd/reference/coef_hmd.md)
  : Obtain Coefficients from Scaled SVD of HMD Data
- [`coef_lfp()`](https://bayesiandemography.github.io/bssvd/reference/coef_lfp.md)
  : Obtain Coefficients from Scaled SVD of OCED Labour Force
  Participation Data
- [`coef_wmd()`](https://bayesiandemography.github.io/bssvd/reference/coef_wmd.md)
  : Obtain Coefficients from Scaled SVD of World Marriage Data
- [`country_code`](https://bayesiandemography.github.io/bssvd/reference/country_code.md)
  : Country Codes
- [`data_ssvd_csa()`](https://bayesiandemography.github.io/bssvd/reference/data_ssvd_csa.md)
  : Prepare Census School Attendance Data
- [`data_ssvd_hfd()`](https://bayesiandemography.github.io/bssvd/reference/data_ssvd_hfd.md)
  : Prepare Data from the Human Fertility Database
- [`data_ssvd_himd()`](https://bayesiandemography.github.io/bssvd/reference/data_ssvd_himd.md)
  : Prepare Data from Human Internal Migration Database
- [`data_ssvd_hmd()`](https://bayesiandemography.github.io/bssvd/reference/data_ssvd_hmd.md)
  : Prepare Data from Human Mortality Database
- [`data_ssvd_lfp()`](https://bayesiandemography.github.io/bssvd/reference/data_ssvd_lfp.md)
  : Prepare OECD Data on Labour Force Participation Rates
- [`data_ssvd_wmd()`](https://bayesiandemography.github.io/bssvd/reference/data_ssvd_wmd.md)
  : Process World Marriage Data
- [`make_matrix_and_offset()`](https://bayesiandemography.github.io/bssvd/reference/make_matrix_and_offset.md)
  : Create Components Needed by a Scaled SVD Object
- [`oecd_lfp_subset`](https://bayesiandemography.github.io/bssvd/reference/oecd_lfp_subset.md)
  : OECD Data on Labour Force Participation
- [`percent_variance()`](https://bayesiandemography.github.io/bssvd/reference/percent_variance.md)
  : Calculate the Percent of Variance Explained by Components in SVD
- [`tidy_csa()`](https://bayesiandemography.github.io/bssvd/reference/tidy_csa.md)
  : Tidy World Marriage Data
- [`tidy_hfd()`](https://bayesiandemography.github.io/bssvd/reference/tidy_hfd.md)
  : Tidy HFD Age-Specific Fertility Data
- [`tidy_himd()`](https://bayesiandemography.github.io/bssvd/reference/tidy_himd.md)
  : Tidy HIMD Age-Specific Internal Migration Data
- [`tidy_hmd()`](https://bayesiandemography.github.io/bssvd/reference/tidy_hmd.md)
  : Tidy HMD Age-Specific Mortality Data
- [`tidy_lfp()`](https://bayesiandemography.github.io/bssvd/reference/tidy_lfp.md)
  : Tidy OCED Labour Force Participation Data
- [`tidy_wmd()`](https://bayesiandemography.github.io/bssvd/reference/tidy_wmd.md)
  : Tidy World Marriage Data
- [`un_csa_subset`](https://bayesiandemography.github.io/bssvd/reference/un_csa_subset.md)
  : Census Data on School Attendance
